toolchain_notes: no Mathlib, use 'theorem' not 'lemma', stdlib only. lakefile.toml has globs=[FVSquad.+*]. LogUnstable.lean has NO namespace — open FVSquad.LogUnstable fails. Import it and use names directly. List.getElem?_append_left takes h:i<l1.length. List.getElem?_take is a simp lemma (simp [h] closes goal).
